text:
Created attachment 218571
Update to version 4.0-beta2

Update to version 4.0-beta2.
SVN patch attached.

Added files:
    files/patch-doc_source___templates_indexcontent.html
    files/patch-doc_source___util_cql.py
Deleted file:
    files/patch-doc_gen-nodetool-docs.py

Updated maven repo must be manually copied to distfiles for patch testing and then uploaded to LOCAL as part of the commit process. It is available at the following link:
https://drive.google.com/uc?id=1vvD9fnI7qzqUW8eclGxk8Zjmf0e3H7_8&export=download
